name: Solarized
description: Ethan Schoonover's precision-engineered color scheme for comfortable reading.

preview.sampleText: Precision colors designed for optimal readability and reduced eye strain.

classes.th: border border-yellow-200 p-2 bg-yellow-200 font-semibold text-yellow-900
classes.blockquote: border-l-4 border-blue-400 pl-4 italic my-4 text-yellow-700 bg-yellow-50 py-2 rounded-r
classes.code: bg-yellow-100 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded font-mono text-sm text-red-600
classes.pre: bg-yellow-100 p-4 rounded overflow-x-auto border border-yellow-200
